---
name: Juno Improvement Proposal (JIP)
about: Propose a change to the protocol (schema, trust model, economics, interfaces, process)
title: "[JIP] "
labels: jip, needs-number
assignees: ''
---

> Read [`specs/jip-process.md`](../../specs/jip-process.md) first. This issue is for **socializing** a proposal; the JIP itself is a PR adding `specs/JIP-N-*.md` from [`specs/jip-template.md`](../../specs/jip-template.md). An editor will assign the number.

## Category

<!-- Core (schema / trust model / on-chain semantics) | Interface (SDK / API) | Economic (token / fees / slashing — requires an on-chain vote to activate) | Meta (process) -->

## Abstract

≤200 words describing the change.

## Motivation

Why is this needed? Which property does it serve?

## Sketch of the specification

Enough detail to evaluate. (Full normative spec goes in the JIP PR.)

## Security considerations

Map to [`docs/THREAT_MODEL.md`](../../docs/THREAT_MODEL.md). Required for Core/Economic JIPs. Note any new defamation / liability / correlated-failure surface.

## Backwards compatibility

Schema/version impact, migration path.
